'''Katichak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Anzat (species)|Anzati]] who learned the [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]]' arts from the ancient and wise [[Akku Seii]]. He did something to warrant being tracked down and presumably killed by a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] named [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]] sometime before [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Tholme had also trained under Seii.
